---
title: PLM Formula
page_id: 185246475
space: unknown
url: https://confluence.cbs-consulting.de/pages/185246475
---
**Overview**
============

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| Name (en) | Formula |
| Name (de) | Formel |
| ET Business Object | PLM\_FORMULA |
| S/4 Business Object | n/a |
| IDOC Business Object | n/a |
**Tables**
==========

|  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **tables** | **Description** | **Bezeichnung DE** | **Header table** |
| /PLMB/RFO\_FRM | Formula | Formel |  |
| /PLMB/RFO\_FRMITM | Formula items | Formelpositionen | /PLMB/RFO\_FRM |

**ET Business Object:** PLM\_FORMULA
**Name (en):** Formula
**General Description**
=======================

Formula is a description of the products produced in a manufacturing process along with the components required, comparing to standards like ISA or S88. In formulas, you manage material and substance data that you require in recipes. You can create a formula as an independent formulator as an integral part of a recipe as a Recipe-Dependent Formula.

Formulas have been realized in the SAP system as specifications of the category Formula and are grouped according to the formula type, that is, the specification type.

They comprise the following:

* The formula master with the formula views. The formula views combine related data that is displayed together on one tab page in formula editing.
* A master data enhancement in the form of value assignment types in the property tree for the formula.

================================================================================

| FCC\_INST\_HDR | Header Information on Status Admin for Fast Close | Kopfinformation Statusverwaltung FastClose |  |
| FCC\_INST\_HDRT | Header Information on Status Admin for Fast Close | Kopfinformation Statusverwaltung FastClose |  |

| FCC\_NOTI\_SENTLOG | Log for Sent Notification | Protokoll für Sendebenachrichtigung |  |
| FCC\_TEMPL\_ID\_SEQ | Template/Task list ID Sequence |  |  |

**ET Business Object:** FI\_CLOSING
**Name (en):** Financial Closing Cockpit
**General Description**
=======================

The SAPFinancial Closing cockpit supports you in planning, executing, monitoring, and analyzing financial closing tasks for the entities of your group.

You can use the SAP S/4HANA Financial Closing cockpit in the following cases:

* Activities recur periodically.
* Multiple responsible agents are involved.
* The activities are performed within a process that has a fixed chronological sequence or is determined by dependencies.
* The activities need to be supported by a shared, uniform interface for everyone involved.
* The status of all periodic activities needs to be documented and made transparent and available for everyone involved.

================================================================================

|  |  |

| ET Business Object | MD2BP\_CUST\_0ID |
| S/4 SDT Business Object | n/a |

| IDOC Business Object | n/a |
**Tables**
==========

All Tables

| tables | Description EN | Bezeichnung DE | Header table |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| /CBSGMBH/M\_KUNNR | Mapping table for KUNNR | Mapping table for KUNNR | X |
|  |  |  |  |
|  |  |  |  |
|  |  |  |  |

**ET Business Object:** MD2BP\_CUST\_0ID
**Name (en):** Legacy customer number for BP on the fly
**General Description**
=======================

You only need this Business Object if you have a mapping MO\_KUNNR between ECC source system and S/4 target system!

The old KUNNR from the ECC system is saved, along with other ID numbers, in table BUT0ID, identified by type CRM002 (R/3 Customer Number).

The Customer Master must already exist in the S/4 target system (at least table /CBSGMBH/M\_KUNNR must be complete).

Export and import of business object MD2BP\_CUST\_0ID take place in the S/4 target system.

If the customer wants to save the old ECC-number of KUNNR in field BUT000-BPEXT (Business Partner Number in External System) you have to implement a data flow in BO MD2BP\_CUST. You don't need to fill table BUT0ID then.

================================================================================

=======================

title: Downtime of resources
page_id: 217851164
space: unknown
url: https://confluence.cbs-consulting.de/pages/217851164
---
**Overview**
============

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| Name (en) | Downtime of resources |
| Name (de) |  |
| ET Business Object | PP\_RESDOW |
| S/4 Business Object | n/a |
| IDOC Business Object | n/a |
**Tables**
==========

All Tables

|  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Table | Description EN | Bezeichnung DE | Master table |
| DTELID | Downtime Element ID | Downtime Element ID | X |
| DTEFW | Downtime Values Entered | Erfasste  Downtimewerte |  |
| DTELTX | Downtime Element Text | Downtime Element Text |  |
| DTSCHEMA | Downtime Schema | Downtime-Schema |  |

**ET Business Object:** PP\_RESDOW
**Name (en):** Downtime of resources
**General Description**
=======================

Downtimes can be defined as the time in which a resource is not productive. Resources to operations and phases in the **master recipe** and in **process orders** to specify with whom or at which parts of the plant a processing step is carried out. Data managed in the resource serves as a basis for scheduling, capacity requirements planning, and costing.

--> This BO is only relevant for PP-**PI** (Production Planning for **Process Industries**). In PP-PI, resources perform the same function as work centers do in PP and have the same structure (BO PP\_WRKCTR).

In the standard system, the most commonly used downtimes are predefined. Along with these predefined downtimes, you can also define your own user-specific downtimes.

You can define new downtimes using transaction DEDT:

Afterwards these the downtimes can be assigned to capacities using transaction CADT and can be used in the resource (TA CRC1, CRC2, CRC3 - PI "*work centers*"):

Using TA DTR0 you can enter the downtimes for the resources (table DTEFW):

================================================================================

---
title: SD Sales Planning
page_id: 286006009
space: unknown
url: https://confluence.cbs-consulting.de/pages/286006009
---
**Overview**
============

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| Name (en) | Sales Planning |
| Name (de) | Vertriebsplanung |
| ET Business Object | SD\_SALESPLAN |
| S/4 SDT Business Object | n/a |
| S/4 to S/4 Business Object | n/a |
| IDOC Business Object | n/a |
**Tables**
==========

All Tables

| tables | Description EN | Bezeichnung DE | Header table |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| SALESPLAN | Sales Plan | Absatzplan | x |
| SALESPLAN\_DS | Sales Plan Dimension Selection | |  |
| SALESPLAN\_ITEM | Sales Plan Item | Vertriebsplanposition |  |
| SALESPLAN\_D | I\_SALESPLANTP I\_SALESPLANTP | I\_SALESPLANTP I\_SALESPLANTP |  |
| SALESPLAN\_DS\_D | I\_SALESPLANTP I\_SALESPLANDIMNSELECTIONTP | |  |
| SALESPLAN\_ITEM\_D | I\_SALESPLANTP I\_SALESPLANITEMTP | I\_SALESPLANTP I\_SALESPLANITEMTP |  |

**ET Business Object:** SD\_SALESPLAN
**Name (en):** Sales Planning
**General Description**
=======================

Business planning can be divided into five main fields: sales planning, production planning, supply planning, financial budgeting, and profit planning. Sales planning primarily entails planning sales volumes, and one of the most important tasks performed by sales employees is to draw up a sales plan on the basis of their current sales, thereby forecasting the expected volume of future incoming sales orders. This provides management with an insight into the expected cash flow. The sales plan serves as a forecast of the expected receipt of sales orders resulting from the sales opportunities currently being pursued. It should reflect the expected sales volumes and the point in time when the sales orders occur (such as the calendar week, month, quarter, or year).

================================================================================

| S/4 SDT Business Object | CO\_SETTLD |
| S/4 to S/4 Business Object | CO\_SETTLD |
| IDOC Business Object | N/A |
**Tables**
==========

All Tables

| tables | Description EN | Bezeichnung DE | Header table |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| AUAK | Document Header for Settlement | Belegkopf für Abrechnung |  |
| AUAI | Settlement Amounts per Depreciation Area | Abrechnungsbeträge je AfA-Bereich | AUAK |
| AUAO | Document Segment: CO Objects to be Settled | Belegsegment: abzurechnende CO-Objekte | AUAK |
| AUAS | Settlement Document: Totals Segment | Abrechnungsbeleg: Summen-Segment | AUAK |
| AUAT | Settlement Document: Totals Segment Per Period | Abrechnungsbeleg: Summen-Segment pro Periode | AUAK |

| AUAA | Settlement Document: Receiver Segment | Abrechnungsbeleg: Empfänger-Segment | AUAK |
| AUAB | Settlement Document: Distribution Rules | Abrechnungsbeleg: Aufteilungsregeln | AUAK |

**ET Business Object:** CO\_SETTLD
**Name (en):** Documents for Settlement
**General Description**
=======================

The settlement document is a means to uniquey identify a settlement in the system. For this purpose, a settlement document must be created for each settlement o a sender object and saved under a separate number.

The settlement document is a necessary prerequisite for the cancellation of settlements.

The settlement documents are defined in number ranges in the settings of the sender object.

================================================================================

space: unknown
url: https://confluence.cbs-consulting.de/pages/124972654
---
**Overview**
============

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| Name (en) | Investment programm |
| Name (de) | Investitionsprogramme |
| ET Business Object | IM\_INVESPRO |
| S/4 Business Object | n/a |
| IDOC Business Object | n/a |
**Tables**
==========

|  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **tables** | **Description** | **Bezeichnung DE** | **Header table** |
| IMTP | Investment programs | Investitionsprogramme |  |
| IMTT | Capital Investment Program Texts | Investitionsprogramme (Texte) | IMTP |
| IMPR | Investment Program Positions | Investitions-Programmpositionen | IMTP |
| IMPZ | Investment Program Positions | Investitions-Programmpositionen | IMTP |
| IMPS | Assignable Operative Objs for Capital Investment Positions | Zuordenbare operative Ojekte für InvProgrammpositionen | IMPR |
| IMPU | Texts for cap. inv. program positions | Texte zu Investitionsprogrammpositionen | IMPR |
| IMZO | Assignment Table: CO Object - Capital Investment Prog.Pos. | Zuordnungstabelle CO-Objekt - Investitions-Programmposition | IMPR |
| IMZR | Assignment Table: CO Object - Cap.Inv.Prog.Pos. (Reports) | Zuordnungstabelle CO-Objekt - InvProgrammposition (Reports) | IMPR |
| ONR00 | General Object Number | Allgemeine Objektnummer | IMPR |

**ET Business Object:** IM\_INVESPRO
**Name (en):** Investment programm
**General Description**
=======================

An investment program represents the planned or budgeted costs for the capital investments (or other projects) of an enterprise or corporate group in the form of a hierarchical structure. You can define the hierarchical structure in any form that suits your needs. It is not dependent on organizational units in the SAP System (such as, business areas, plants, and so on). You could structure the hierarchy to agree with the organizational plan of your enterprise, for example. Or you could base the structure on the size of the investment measures assigned to it.

================================================================================

title: SOP Orders
page_id: 124965440
space: unknown
url: https://confluence.cbs-consulting.de/pages/124965440
---
**Overview**
============

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| Name (en) | Sales and Operation Planning Orders |
| Name (de) |  |
| ET Business Object | PP\_SOPORD  (till ET 2021 FP 2 PP60SOPORD) |
| S/4 Business Object | n/a |
**Tables**
==========

**ET Business Object:** PP\_SOPORD  (till ET 2021 FP 2 PP60SOPORD)
**Name (en):** Sales and Operation Planning Orders
**General Description**
=======================

Sales & Operations Planning (SOP) is a flexible forecasting and planning tool with which sales, production, and other supply chain targets can be set on the basis of historical, existing, and estimated future data. Rough-cut planning can also be carried out to determine the amounts of the capacities and other resources required to meet these targets.  SOP is particularly suitable for long- and medium-term planning.

The BO contains table SAUF which is necessary to migrate SOP Orders.

================================================================================

---

============

|  |  |
| --- | --- |

| Name (de) | Elektronischer Kontoauszug |
| ET Business Object | N/A |
| S/4 SDT Business Object | FI\_ELKA\_SDT |
| S/4 to S/4 Business Object | N/A |
| IDOC Business Object | N/A |
**Tables**
==========

All Tables

| tables | Description EN | Bezeichnung DE | Header table |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| FEBVW | Electronic Banking Management Recors | Verwaltungssätze Elektronik Banking |  |
| FEBKO | Electronic Bank Statement Header Records | Kopfsätze des Elektronischen Kontoauszugs | FEBVW |
| FEBEP | Electronic Bank Statement Line Items | Einzelposten des Elektronischen Kontoauszugs | FEBKO |
| FEBRE | Reference record for electronic bank statement line item | Referenzsatz zu einem Einzelposten des Elektr. Kontoauszug | FEBEP |
| FEBRE\_ORIG | Original Ref. Record for an Elec. Bank Statement Line Item | Original Referenzsatz zu einem Einzelposten des EKontoauszug | FEBEP |
| FEBCL | Clearing data for an electronic bank statement line item | Clearing-Daten zu einem Einzelposten des Elektr. Kontoauszug | FEBEP |
| FEBKEY | ID administration | Kurzschlüsselverwaltung | FEBEP |
| FEBMS | Message table for Finnish bank statement | Nachrichtentabelle für finnischen Kontoauszug | FEBEP |
| FEBPI | Polling Statement Line Item Information | Polling-Auszug Einzelposteninformation | FEBEP |

**Name (en):** Electronic Bank Statement
**General Description**
=======================

With S/4HANA On Premise 2023 (OP2023), a string-based persistence for memo lines of bank statements and lockbox files has been developed. The long-term goal is to replace the database tables FEBRE and FEBRE\_ORIG with the table FEB\_MEMOLINE. To achieve that, OP2023 introduces the database table FEB\_MEMOLINE as an additional persistence, which is kept in sync with the classic tables. If active (by customizing), this database table is used by CDS views for read accesses of the memo lines.

The OIE will create these table

================================================================================

=======================

Variant functions can be used to add customer specific coding to object dependencies. The coding will be integrated via function modules.

The functions can be used to check and derive specific values (e.g. Complex calculations based on characteristic values of the configuration).

**Name (en):** Ressources
General Description
===================

A resource comprises goods and services that are supplied to the company both externally and internally in order to produce operational services.

Resources cannot be used in actual. For this purpose, they can only be created as single values and not in hierarchies.

Resource planning will replace detailed planning in the future.

**ET Business Object:** CO\_CTRL

**General Description**
=======================

Control tables are used to store the data from the screens or programs. Thereby the control data, regarding the organization data, are stored.

Control tables are tables used to store data related to the data dictionary itself rather than transactional, user, master data, etc. These tables store properties of other tables and programs.

================================================================================

| VIBDBUPT | Property Tax Data for Building | Grundsteuerdaten für Gebäude |  |
| VIBDBU | Building | Gebäude | X |
| JSTO | Status object information | Informationen zum Statusobjekt |  |
| JEST | Individual Object Status | Einzelstatus pro Objekt |  |
| JCDS | Change Documents for System/User Statuses (Table JEST) | Änderungsbelege für System-/Anwenderstatus (Tabelle JEST) |  |
| JCDO | Change Documents for Status Object (Table JSTO) | Änderungsbelege zum Statusobjekt (Tabelle JSTO) |  |
| VIBDAO | Architectural Object | Architektonisches Objekt |  |
| VIBDMEAS | Measurement | Bemessung |  |
| VIBDNODE | Higher-Level Architectural Object | Übergeordnetes Arch. Objekt |  |

**ET Business Object:** REFX\_Building
**Name (en):** RE-FX Building
**General Description**
=======================

In SAP RE-FX (Flexible Real Estate Management), **buildings** are core master data objects used to manage and represent physical real estate structures. They are part of the so-called **dual-view model**:

* **Architectural View**: describes the physical structure – e.g., buildings, floors, rooms
* **Usage View**: describes the economic utilization – e.g., rental objects, leased areas

A building object in RE-FX includes:

* **Object Number (OBJNR)**: typically starts with “IB\*”
* **Address and location data**
* **Assignment to a business entity**
* **Technical attributes** (e.g., year of construction, equipment)
* **Link to rental objects and contracts**
* **Area breakdown** (e.g., rentable area, common area)

================================================================================

**ET Business Object:** PP\_RCUTPP    Rought cut planning Profile  PP\_ROUT    Routing without material assignment  PP\_ROUT\_M    Routing with material assignment  PM\_TASKL\_A    General maintenance task lists  PM\_TASKL\_E    Equipment Task list  PM\_TASKL\_T    Maintenance task lists for functional location  PP\_RECIPE    Recipes  PP\_RECIPE\_M    Recipes with material assignment  PM\_EQTASKL    Equipment taks lists  PS\_STDNETW    Standard Network  PS\_STDNETW\_M    Standard Network with material assignment  QM\_INSPPLAN    Inspection Plans  QM\_INSPPLAN\_M    Inspection Plans with material assingment    (till ET 2023 FP1 PP\_STROUT )  (till ET 2021 FP 2 PP60STROUT)
**Name (en):** Rought cut planning Profile. PP  Routing. PP  Maintenance task lists. PM  Recipes. PP  Equipment taks lists. PM  Standard Network. PS  Inspection Plans. QM
**General Description**
=======================

**Routing** defines a sequence of activities performed at the work center. Routing plays in important role in calculating production cost, machine time and labor time. For costing, the system selects a routing for the material using the costing variant and its quantity structure determination ID. The planned costs are calculated for each operation. The system calculates the amount of activity used using the formula in the work center and the default values in the operation of the routing. This activity is valuated using the prices in Cost Center Accounting or Activity-Based Costing to calculate the planned costs for the operation.

The BO PP\_STROUT contains the required tables to migrate the SAP Routings. This same business object can be use to migrate all types of Task Lists.

Key Features Related to Routing
-------------------------------

* To create routing, it is mandatory to first define the work center.
* Multiple materials can follow through a single routing group.
* Default values are used to calculate the dates, capacities, and production costs
* Costs of an operation are taken into account for costing.

================================================================================

All Tables

| tables | Description EN | Bezeichnung DE | Header table |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| VZZKOKO | Table condition header | Tabelle Konditionskopf | X |

| VZZKOPO | Table condition items | Tabelle Konditionspositionen |  |

| VZZUSP | Payment splitting | Zahlungssplitting |  |
| JBDKOKOADDON | Additional Information on Table VZZKOKO | Zusatzinformationen zur Tabelle VZZKOKO |  |
| TWX2 | Sec.-index class data | Sec.-Index Gattungsdaten |  |

**ET Business Object:** FSCM\_TRM\_FTVV
**Name (en):** FSCM TRM - overarching objects loans/securities from FVV
**General Description**
=======================

This business object contains condition tables for payments. A condition is a contractually agreed element of a financial transaction or financial instrument. It describes the structure of the transaction in terms of the period and amount (interest, repayment, and so on). For example, the VZZKOKO table in SAP ERP systems serves as a header table for conditions that are used in various business processes, e.g. in pricing or for bonus payments. It contains general information about condition contracts, such as the status, the validity period or the parties involved. The SAP transaction WCOCO is also used to manage condition contracts, while VZZKOKO is the underlying table.

================================================================================

---
title: Material Conditions
page_id: 113113500
space: unknown
url: https://confluence.cbs-consulting.de/pages/113113500
---
**General Description**
=======================

Material Conditions are also called Variant Conditions. You can use variant conditions to influence the price of a configurable material depending on the characteristic values assigned. 

The BO contains some specific condition and control tables which are related to the material master.

Table TVARC is used in characteristics assigned to variant tables. They can be viewed via transaction CU63.
**Overview**
============

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| Name (en) | Variant Configuration - Conditions  (until ET 2026 Material Conditions) |
| Name (de) | Varianten Konfiguration - Konditionen  (bis ET 2026 Material Konditionen) |
| ET Business Object | VC\_COND  ( until ET 2025FP2 MM\_MATCOND)  (until ET 2021 FP 2 MM60MATCOND) |
| S/4 Business Object | n/a |
**Tables**
==========

|  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **tables** | **Description** | **Bezeichnung DE** |

| MACOND | Configuration: Manually Assigned Conditions | Konfiguration: manuell zugeordnete Konditionen |
| TVARC | Variant conditions | Variantenkonditionen |

| CDCND | Configuration: Direct Conditions Data Type:CHAR | Configuration: Direct Conditions Datatyp:CHAR |
| HBSCNB | Configuration <-> condition indexing | Konfiguration <-> Beschaffenheitsindizierung |

**ET Business Object:** CA\_EDOCUMENT
**Name (en):** eDocument Cockpit
**General Description**
=======================

With this app, you can process electronic documents (eDocuments) that are created automatically based on source documents.

Key Features
------------

* Display eDocuments
* Submit eDocuments in the required XML format to external systems.
* Monitor the status of the eDocuments and perform subsequent actions on them. Which actions are available depends on the specific process you are using.

================================================================================

**ET Business Object:** FARRAD\_FOUNDATION
**Name (en):** Package: Revenue Accounting: Adapter Reuse Layer
**General Description**
=======================

Data received from source applications generate RAIs (Revenue Accounting Items) to pass the contract information to RAR. SAP applications like SD can be configured to generate RAIs in ARL (Adapter Reuse Layer) automatically.

RAIs (Revenue Accounting Items) in simple terms can be referred to as common language understandable by RAR system. Data received from all the source applications generate RAIs (Revenue Accounting Items).

Once Revenue Accounting Items are created, they need to be processed to create/update RA Contract and POBs (Performance Obligations).

================================================================================

title: Order change management
page_id: 217851137
space: unknown
url: https://confluence.cbs-consulting.de/pages/217851137
---
**Overview**
============

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| Name (en) | Order change management |
| Name (de) | Änderungsdienst für Fertigungsaufträge (OCM) |
| ET Business Object | PP\_OCM |
| S/4 Business Object | n/a |
| IDOC Business Object | n/a |
**Tables**
==========

All Tables

|  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Table | Description EN | Bezeichnung DE | Master table |
| COMPH | OCM: Comparison result (header entry) | OCM: Vergleichsergebnis (Kopfeintrag) | X |
| COMPCMP | OCM: Comparison result, individual records for components | OCM: Vergleichsergebnis, Einzelsätze für Komponenten |  |
| COMPCONF | OCM: Comparison result, state of change numbers | OCM: Vergleichsergebnis, Zustand Änderungsnummern |  |
| COMPF | OCM: Names of compared fields | OCM: Namen der verglichenen Felder |  |
| COMPHDR | OCM: Comparison results, indiv. records for order headers | OCM: Vergleichsergebnis, Einzelsätze für Auftragsköpfe |  |
| COMPITM | OCM: Comparison result, individual records for items | OCM: Vergleichsergebnis, Einzelsätze für Positionen |  |
| COMPMSG | Messages from checks for leveling steps | Nachrichten aus Prüfungen zu Abgleichschritten |  |
| COMPOPR | OCM: Comparison result, individual records for operations | OCM: Vergleichsergebnis, Einzelsätze für Vorgänge |  |
| COMPPRT | OCM: Comparison result, individual record for PRTs | OCM: Vergleichsergebnis, Einzelsätze für Fertigungshilfsm. |  |
| COMPSQU | OCM: Comparison results; Single records for sequences | OCM: Vergleichsergebnis, Einzelsätze für Folgen |  |
| FUNOCM | Function marked for Order Change Management | Funktionsvormerkung für Order Change Management | X |
| FUNREQ | Function marked for PP/PS | Funktionsvormerkung für PP / PS | X |
| OCMHOMO\_ARCH | Backup Table of Homogeneity List in Case of Archiving | Sicherungstabelle der Homogenitätsliste im Falle Archivierun |  |

**ET Business Object:** PP\_OCM
**Name (en):** Order change management
**General Description**
=======================

Engineering change management (ECH) allows you to change various master data in a coordinated manner when they have to be changed together within a change process. Future procurement elements can thus be created directly with a changed product structure.

**O** rder **c** hange **m** anagement (change management for production orders), in short OCM , expands this function. It is possible to include existing procurement elements (production orders, planned orders, purchase orders) that are also affected by a change, in the change process. The change process begins when a sales order or master data is changed. You can also adapt production orders on which work has already been done to the changed product structure.

================================================================================

title: FSCM TRM Master Data Additional Fields
page_id: 307374347

---
**Overview**
============

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| Name (en) | FSCM TRMFWZZ Master Data Additional Fields |
| Name (de) | FSCM TRM FWZZ Master Data Additional Fields |
| ET Business Object | FSCM\_*TRM\_TRMKR* |
| S/4 SDT Business Object | FSCM\_*TRM\_TRMKR* |
| S/4 to S/4 Business Object | FSCM\_*TRM\_TKMKR* |
| IDOC Business Object | N/A |
**Tables**
==========

All Tables

| tables | Description EN | Bezeichnung DE | Header table |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| /TRMKR/SEC\_DATA | FWZZ Master Data Additional FieldsTreasury: Reconciliation business transactions |  |  |
|  |  |  |  |

**ET Business Object:** FSCM\_*TRM\_TRMKR
**Name (en):** FSCM TRMFWZZ Master Data Additional Fields
**General Description**
=======================

/TRMKR/SEC\_DATA is a standard SAP Table which is used to store FWZZ Master Data Additional Fields data in SAP systems, such as SAP R/3, [S/4HANA](https://www.se80.co.uk/sap-tables/?name=/trmkr/sec_data), depending on the version and release level. The /TRMKR/SEC\_DATA table consists of various fields, each holding specific information or linking keys about FWZZ Master Data Additional Fields data available in SAP. These include SECURITY\_ID (Security ID Number), INT\_PAYM\_RULE (Interest Payment Rule), INT\_ROUND\_RULE (Interest Rounding Rule), INT\_DUE\_DAT\_RULE (Interest Due Date Rule)...

================================================================================

---

| Name (de) | Alte Lieferantennummer für Business Partner on the fly |
| ET Business Object | MD2BP\_VEND\_0ID |
| S/4 SDT Business Object | n/a |
| S/4 to S/4 Business Object | MD2BP\_VEND\_0ID |
| IDOC Business Object | n/a |
**Tables**
==========

All Tables

| tables | Description EN | Bezeichnung DE | Header table |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| /CBSGMBH/M\_LIFNR | Mapping table for LIFNR | Mapping table for LIFNR | X |
|  |  |  |  |
|  |  |  |  |
|  |  |  |  |

**ET Business Object:** MD2BP\_VEND\_0ID
**Name (en):** Legacy vendor number for BP on the fly
**General Description**
=======================

You only need this Business Object if you have a mapping MO\_LIFNR between ECC source system and S/4 target system!

The old LIFNR from the ECC system is saved, along with other ID numbers, in table BUT0ID, identified by type CRM004 (R/3 Vendor Number).

The Vendor Master must already exist in the S/4 target system (at least table /CBSGMBH/M\_LIFNR must be complete).

Export and import of business object MD2BP\_VEND\_0ID take place in the S/4 target system.

If the customer wants to save the old ECC-number of LIFNR in field BUT000-BPEXT (Business Partner Number in External System) you have to implement a data flow in BO MD2BP\_VEND. You don't need to fill table BUT0ID then.

================================================================================

title: Workflow
page_id: 206467874
space: unknown
url: https://confluence.cbs-consulting.de/pages/206467874
---
**Overview**
============

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| Name (en) | Workflow |
| Name (de) | Workflow |
| ET Business Object | CA\_WORKFL |
| S/4 Business Object | n/a |

No MergeA Merge into a existing filled target system is not implemented yet. The mapping of the content of the field "DATA" in table "SWWCNTP0" is not supported.
**Tables**
==========

It is worth calling the SWW package in the Object Navigator (transaction SE80). This package contains the most important objects around SAP Business Workflow. So also the most important tables. You can display all associated tables by calling the folder under "SWW > Dictionary objects > Database tables".

Generally, most SAP workflow tables start with the prefix "SWW". You can do a wildcard search here in the ABAP Dictionary (transaction SE11) by using the F4 help with "SWW\*". This will allow you to find other important SAP Workflow tables based on the description.

| Table | Description EN | Bezeichnung DE |
| --- | --- | --- |
| SWWWIHEAD | Workflow Runtime: Header Table for All Work Item Types | Workflow-Laufzeit: Kopftabelle für alle Workitem-Typen |
| SWWLOGHIST | Workflow Runtime: History of a Work Item | Workflow Runtime: Historie eines Workitems |
| SWW\_CONTOB | Workflow Runtime: Work Item Data Container (Only Objects) | Workflow Runtime: Workitem-Datencontainer (nur Objekte) |
| SWWWIAGENT | Workflow Runtime: Agents for Execution of a Work Item | Workflow Runtime: Agenten bei der Ausführung eines Workitems |
| SWWWIRET | Workflow Runtime: Return Values of Method Call | Workflow Runtime: Rückgabewerte des Methodenaufruf |
| SWP\_HEADER | Workflow Instances: Header Data of a Workflow Execution | Workflow Instances: Header Data of a Workflow Execution |
| SWPNODE | WFM: Node Properties and Node Hierarchy at Runtime | WFM: Knoteneigenschaften und -hierarchie zur Laufzeit |
| SWPNODELOG | Workflow: Instance Data of Nodes of a Workflow Execution | Workflow: Instanzdaten der Knoten einer Workflow-Ausführun |
| SWPSTEPLOG | Workflow: Instance Data of Steps of a Workflow Execution | Workflow: Instanzdaten der Schritte e. Workflow-Ausführung |
| SWP\_ADM\_US | WFM: Administrator(s) for a workflow instance | WFM: Administrator(en) für eine Workflow-Instanz |
| SWP\_JOIN | Workflow instances: Join node of a workflow execution | Workflow Instanzen: Join-Knoten einer Workflow-Ausführung |
| SWP\_NODEWI | WF: Work items for nodes in a workflow definition | WF: Workitems zu Knoten einer Workflow-Definition |
| SWP\_SUSPEN | Workflow instances: Suspended work item callbacks | Workflow instances: Suspended work item callbacks |
| SWWWITEXT | Workflow Runtime: Work Item Texts | Workflow Runtime: Workitemtexte |
| SWW\_CONT | Workflow Runtime: Work Item Data Container | Workflow Runtime: Workitem-Datencontainer |
| SWW\_WI2OBJ | Workflow Runtime: Relation of Work Item to Object | Workflow Runtime: Relation of Work Item to Object |
| SWWWIDH | Workflow Runtime: Deadline Monitoring of Work Items | Workflow Runtime: Deadline Überwachung der Workitems |
| SWWBINDEF | Obsolete 6.1/ Workflow Runtime - Save Bindin... | obsolet 6.1/ Workflow Runtime - Speicherung der Datenfl... |
| SWWCNTP0 | Workflow Container: XML Database (P0) | Workflow-Container: XML-Datenbank (P0) |
| SWWCNTPADD | Workflow Runtime: Persistence for Additional Container (XML) | Workflow Runtime: Persistenz für zusätzliche Container (XML) |
| SWWEI | Workflow Runtime: Work Items of Type E (Event Items) | Workflow Runtime: Workitems vom Typ E (Event Items) |
| SWWFLEXDL | Flexible Workflow deadlines | Flexible Workflow deadlines |
| SWWFLEXDLA | Flexible Workflow Deadline Actions | Flexible Workflow Deadline Actions |
| SWWFLEXDLAP | Flexible Workflow: deadline action parameter | Flexible Workflow: deadline action parameter |
| SWWFLEXPROC | Workflow Runtime: Process definition flexible workflow | Workflow Runtime: Process definition flexible workflow |
| SWWLOGPARA | Obsolete 4.6/ WIM Log Table: Actions on WIs - Parameters | obsolet 4.6/ WIM Log Tabelle: Aktionen auf WIs - Parameter |
| SWWORGTASK | Workflow Runtime: Assignment of WIs to Org. Unit/Task | Workflow Runtime: Zuordnung von WIs auf OrgEinheit/Aufgabe |
| SWWRUNMETH | Obsolete 6.1/ Workflow Runtime - Save Methods | obsolet 6.1/ Workflow Runtime - Speicherung der Methoden |
| SWWSWPRET | Obsolete 6.1/ Workflow Runtime - Save Modele... | obsolet 6.1/ Workflow Runtime - Speicherung der modellie... |
| SWWUSERWI | Current Work Items Assigned to a User | Aktuelle Workitems eines Benutzers |
| SWWWICOMMENT | Workflow Runtime: Work item Comments | Workflow Runtime: Work item Comments |
| SWW\_PROPERTIES | Workflow Runtime: Workflow Attributes (System) | Workflow-Laufzeit: Workflow-Attribute (System) |
| SWWWIDEADL | Workflow Runtime: Deadline Data for Work Items | Workflow Runtime: Deadline Daten für Workitems |
| SWZAI | Header Table for all Properties of a Work Queue | Kopftabelle für alle Attribute eines Arbeitsvorrates |
| SWZAIENTRY | Object Table for Work Queues (Entries) | Objekttabelle für Arbeitsvorräte (Einträge) |
| SWZAIRET | Return Values of Method Call of a WQ Line | Rückgabewerte des Methodenaufrufs einer AV Zeile |
| SWWOUTBOX | Workflow Outbox (Work Item - Processor - Timestamp) | Workflow Outbox (Workitem - Bearbeiter - Timestanp) |
| SWW\_EVENTS | Workflow: Events in Workflow | Workflow: Ereignisse im Workflow |
| SWW\_WIREGISTER | Workflow:  Registration of a Work Item | Workflow:  Registration of a Work Item |
| SWW\_WI\_REQUEST | Workflow:  Administration Request | Workflow:  Administration Request |

**ET Business Object:** CA\_WORKFL
**Name (en):** Workflow
**General Description**
=======================

With SAP Business Workflow, it is possible to map automated business processes in SAP ERP or SAP S/4HANA. This makes it possible, for example, to coordinate approval or release processes optimally and reduce process runtimes. Important processes and use cases are the purchase-to-pay and order-to-cash process.

================================================================================

**ET Business Object:** EHS\_CBIH
**Name (en):** EHS: Incident/Accident Log
**General Description**
=======================

This object is used  in EHS to record initially and then review and complete incidents, safety observations, and near misses to fulfill your environment, health, and safety (EHS) requirements on a regional and global scale.  Aditional information can be collected from the people involved, also information of the cause of the incident  ,track of the financial impact on the organization and its assets. Also risk can be assessed.

================================================================================

| BKK621 | Cash Concentration: Different Amount Defintions | Cash Concentration: abweichende Betragsfestlegungen |  |
| BKK622 | Cash Concentration: Balancing Date of Last Execution | Cash Concentration: Abschlussdatum der letzten Ausführung |  |
| BKK623 | Enhancement Fields for Cash Concentration / Hierarchies | Ergänzungsfelder für Cash Concentration / Hierarchien |  |

| BKK9B\_CC | Value Date Transaction Figures for Cash Concentration | Valutaverkehrszahlen für Cash Concentration |  |
| BKK\_HY\_RELEASE | Track changes to hierachies in release process |  |  |

**ET Business Object:** FSCM\_IHC\_RELATION
**Name (en):** FSCM IHC Account Relationship
**General Description**
=======================

Relationships can exist between accounts in the form of a hierarchy, which you can show in a tree structure.

You can create any types of hierarchies. In the standard system, the hierarchy types for cash concentration and interest compensation are used, but you can also create other hierarchy types, for example, for information purposes.

A hierarchy consists of a root account, for which n subordinate accounts can exist. You can also assign n subordinate accounts to each of these subordinate accounts. The number of hierarchy levels depends on the hierarchy type.

Relationships within the hierarchy are always valid for a certain time period. You specify this when you create the hierarchy. To ensure clarity, an account may exist only in one hierarchy at any given time, and within one hierarchy type.

================================================================================

title: CS Maintenance Plans

url: https://confluence.cbs-consulting.de/pages/124949427
---
**Overview**
============

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| Name (en) | Maintanance Plan |
| Name (de) | Wartungspläne |
| ET Business Object | PM\_MAPLAN (till ET 2021 FP 2 CS60MAPLAN) |
| S/4 Business Object | n/a |
**Tables**
==========

|  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| table | Description | Bezeichnung DE | Header table |
| ILOA | PM Object Location and Account Assignment | PM Object Location and Account Assignment |  |
| MHIO | Call Object from Maintenance Order | Call Object from Maintenance Order |  |
| MHIS | Maintenance plan history | Maintenance plan history |  |
| MMPT | Cycle definitions and MeasPoints for MaintPlan | Cycle definitions and MeasPoints for MaintPlan |  |
| MPLA | Maintenance plan | Maintenance plan | X |
| MPOS | Maintenance item | Maintenance item |  |
| OBJK | Plant Maintenance Object List | Plant Maintenance Object List |  |
| SER00 | General Header Table for Serial Number Management | General Header Table for Serial Number Management |  |
| COBRA | Settlement Rule for Order Settlement | Abrechnungsvorschrift Auftragsabrechnung |  |
| COBRB | Distribution Rules Settlement Rule Order Settlement | Aufteilungsregeln Abrechnungsvorschrift Auftragsabrechnung |  |

**ET Business Object:** PM\_MAPLAN (till ET 2021 FP 2 CS60MAPLAN)
**Name (en):** Maintanance Plan
**General Description**
=======================

Description of the maintenance and inspection tasks to be performed at maintenance objects. The maintenance plans describe the dates and scope of the tasks.

A maintenance plan basically consists of the following elements:

**Maintenance item(s)**

A maintenance item describes which preventive maintenance tasks should take place regularly at a technical object or a group of technical objects.

A maintenance plan automatically always contains a maintenance item. You can create additional maintenance items directly in the maintenance plan, or assign existing maintenance items which have not yet been assigned. Exceptions to this rule include maintenance plans for service procurement and maintenance plans with reference to an outline agreement. These plans have only one maintenance item.

**Maintenance plan**

The maintenance plan contains scheduling information from the following sources:

       For single cycle plans, from the maintenance cycle

       For strategy plans from the maintenance strategy assigned to the maintenance plan

       For multiple counter plans from the maintenance cycles

       From the scheduling parameters specific to this maintenance plan

When you schedule the maintenance plan, this information is used to calculate the due dates for the maintenance operations to be performed on the assigned technical objects.

================================================================================

| CUXREF | Object Dependency Cross References | Cross-Referenzen des Beziehungswissens |  |
| CURSADD | Dependency Net Additional Data | Beziehungsnetz Zusatzdaten |  |

**ET Business Object:** VC\_DEPENDENCY  for prefill numbering at harmonization:  VC\_KNNUM\_MAPPING
**Name (en):** Dependency repository
**General Description**
=======================

Dependencies describe the interdependencies between characteristics and characteristic values. This prevents combinations of options that are not allowed.

You can have global and local dependencies:

The differences are as follows:

* Global dependencies are created centrally and can be assigned to several objects.
* Local dependencies are created for one object and can only be used with this object.

Global dependencies are identified by an externally assigned name, local knowledge by an internal number.

To put it simply:

CUKB-KNNUM = CUKB-KNNAM --> Local dependencies

CUKB-KNNUM ≠ CUKB-KNNAM --> Global dependencies

Object dependencies can be used in classification **AND** in variant configuration. In variant configuration, they are used to make it easier to create an order for a complex product with a large number of variants.

If both applications are in use in your company, you may find that object dependencies are used for two completely different purposes. However, it is not currently possible to separate the use of object dependencies in classification from their use in variant configuration.

The object dependencies assigned to characteristics or characteristic values apply in both classification and variant configuration functions.

<https://help.sap.com/viewer/875f0532320a4a41aa627bb6e79df8ea/701%20SP22/en-US/d058ce5376924608e10000000a174cb4.html>

================================================================================

**ET Business Object:** PLM\_BOM\_DOST  PP\_BOM\_EQST  PP\_BOM\_KDST  PP\_BOM\_MAST  PP\_BOM\_PRST  PP\_BOM\_STST  PP\_BOM\_TPST
**Name (en):** Bill of Material
**General Description**
=======================

A bill of material is a complete, formally structured list of the components that make up a product or assembly. The list comprises of the material number of each component, together with the quantity and unit of measure. BOM can be single level and multi-level.

================================================================================

**General Description**
=======================

All entries there can be assigned manually via transaction FLQAM. If you make a payment for a single amount, e.g. via FB01 ( Vendor,  Cash), this entry ends up in FLQITEMFI and can be manually assigned to a liquidity item via FLQAM, as they are not processed via the automatic assignment.

=======================

The module supports the entire lifecycle of securities, from investment and posting to evaluation and reporting. The transaction data is migrated via the FSCM TRM Transfer business object.

---
title: HR Master
page_id: 120119132
space: unknown
url: https://confluence.cbs-consulting.de/pages/120119132
---
**General Description**
=======================

Maintaining the HR Master Data function allows you to maintain employee data.

Data related to an employee is entered in various Infotypes. For example, Infotype 0002 contains personal information of an employee like name, date of birth, marital status, etc. Infotypes are used to group similar data and makes it easier to process.

The main table is PA0000.

================================================================================

**ET Business Object:** UTIL\_CONTRACT
**Name (en):** IS-U contracts
**General Description**
=======================

The contract represents a concrete agreement between supplier and customer in the system. The contract is the link to the installation and therefore to the technical master data of an object.

Several contracts of a business partner can be bundled via the contract account. Invoicing, dunning and payment processing take place at contract account level in FI-CA.

================================================================================

title: Combined FICO NGL
page_id: 307366217
space: unknown
url: https://confluence.cbs-consulting.de/pages/307366217
---
**Overview**
============

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| Name (en) | Combined FICO NGL |
| Name (de) | FICO Kombiniert NGL |
| ET Business Object |  |
| S/4 Business Object | AC\_FICO\_COMBINED\_NGL\_SDT |
| IDOC Business Object | n/a |
**Tables**
==========

All Tables

|  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Table | Description EN | Bezeichnung DE | Master table |
| /CBSGMBH/A\_AWKEY | Object key | Objektschlüssel | X |
| /CBSGMBH/A\_COSEL | preselected data for CO | vorselektierte Daten für CO |  |
| COBK | Accounting Document Header | Belegkopf für Buchhaltung |  |
| COEP | Accounting Document Segment | Belegsegment Buchhaltung |  |
| BKPF | Entry View of Accounting Document for Additional Ledgers | Erfassungssicht Buchhaltungsbeleg für zusätzliche Ledger |  |
| BSEG | CO Object: Document Header | CO-Objekt: Belegkopf |  |
| BSEG\_ADD | CO Object: Line Items (by Period) | CO-Objekt: Einzelposten periodenbezogen |  |
| FAGLFLEXA | Generated Table for View | Hauptbuch: Ist-Einzelposten |  |
| FAGL\_SPLINFO | Generated Table for View | Aufteilungsinformation der OP's |  |
| FAGL\_SPLINFO\_VAL | General Ledger: Actual Line Items | Aufteilungsinformation der OP's Werte |  |

**Name (en):** Combined FICO NGL
**General Description**
=======================

This BO combines the two BOs AC\_FI\_DOC\_SDT and AC\_CO\_DOC\_SDT.  Starting with ET 2023 FP2, report [/CBSGMBH/DMF\_PRESEL\_4\_CO](https://confluence.cbs-consulting.de/pages/viewpage.action?pageId=246495559) only selects the value types 04 and 11 from the COEP depending on time and company code as well as the FI documents depending on time and company code. The FI documents and the CO documents in the ACDOCA are linked in one go.

Warning

Report [/CBSGMBH/DMF\_PRESEL\_4\_CO](https://confluence.cbs-consulting.de/pages/viewpage.action?pageId=246495559) is used to fill tables /CBSGMBH/A\_AWKEY and /CBSGMBH/A\_COSEL. Apart from the selection criteria of this report, filters on controlling area (KOKRS), company code (BUKRS) or fiscal year (GJAHR) should **not** be used except for doing logical splits. Otherwise, cross company documents might be lost or processed incorrectly.

For the same reason, you should not change the table key relations for /CBSGMBH/A\_AWKEY and /CBSGMBH/A\_COSEL. I.e. do **not** use company code and fiscal year to connect /CBSGMBH/A\_AWKEY and /CBSGMBH/A\_COSEL to the tables below.

In general, the fields in these tables should not be used for any "semantical" processing, like using them in filters or mappings. This is especially important for KOKRS, BUKRS and GJAHR.

================================================================================

All Tables

**ET Business Object:** MD\_BANK
**Name (en):** Bank Master Data
**General Description**
=======================

The bank master data can be:

* migrated directly via the BO,
* migrated by attaching the tables to the objects for customers/vendors (advantage: only bank master data that is really relevant is migrated).
* created by using the bank details in the customer/vendor master to create new bank master data entries (precondition: bank details must exist in the target, and mapped values must be used)

================================================================================

**ET Business Object:** (CA\_LIS  (till ET 2021 FP 2 CA60LIS))  Business Object will be created with  BO Status 97
**Name (en):** LIS: Logistics Information System
**General Description**
=======================

The information systems in logistics are flexible tools for collecting, aggregating and analyzing data from the operative applications (Purchasing, Sales, Production, Inventory Controlling, Plant Maintenance, Quality Management/Inspection Processing). They thus enable you to continually control target criteria and to react in time to exceptional situations.

================================================================================

---
title: Storage Bin Stock (Quants)
page_id: 117441931
space: unknown
url: https://confluence.cbs-consulting.de/pages/117441931
---
**Overview**
============

|  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Name (en) | Storage Bin Stock (Quants) |  |
| Name (de) | Quants |
| ET Business Object | WM\_SBSTO |
| S/4 Business Object | n/a |
| IDOC Business Object | n/a |
**Tables**
==========

|  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **tables** | **Description** | **Bezeichnung DE** | **Header table** |
| LQUA | Quants | Lagerquants |  |
| LQUAB | Total quant counts for certain strategies | Summeninformation zu Lagerquants bei bestimmten Strategien |  |

**ET Business Object:** WM\_SBSTO
**Name (en):** Storage Bin Stock (Quants)
**General Description**
=======================

Quants is used to manage stocks at storage bin level. It is the same material stock concept in storage bin.

The system manages different batches of a material as different quants.

It can be created or deleted solely through goods movements when the material quantity is picked.

Click here for details

Definition
----------

Stock of a specific product with the same characteristics in one [storage bin](https://help.sap.com/viewer/3d97bec9bf1649099384bb8167df3cf2/9.5.0.2/en-US/55c8cb53ad377114e10000000a174cb4.html), [resource](https://help.sap.com/viewer/3d97bec9bf1649099384bb8167df3cf2/9.5.0.2/en-US/bfcbcb53ad377114e10000000a174cb4.html), [transportation unit](https://help.sap.com/viewer/3d97bec9bf1649099384bb8167df3cf2/9.5.0.2/en-US/4fc8e4bb505d462ae10000000a42189e.html) (TU), or [handling unit](https://help.sap.com/viewer/3d97bec9bf1649099384bb8167df3cf2/9.5.0.2/en-US/7fc8cb53ad377114e10000000a174cb4.html) (HU). The system manages different batches of a product as different quants.

Use
---

When you put a product away into an empty storage bin in Extended Warehouse Management (EWM), the system creates a quant in this storage bin. You can increase the quantity of a quant by adding to the existing stock. When you remove the quantity from storage, the system automatically deletes the quant.

The system manages stock data per quant. Stock data includes the following:

* Stock key, such as product number, batch number, and party entitled to dispose
* Stock quantities, such as physical quantity and available quantity
* Stock attributes, such as weight, volume, goods receipt date, and shelf life expiration date
* Serial numbers

================================================================================

title: Work centers
page_id: 120111083
space: unknown
url: https://confluence.cbs-consulting.de/pages/120111083
---
**Overview**
============

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| Name (en) | Work Center |
| Name (de) | Arbeitsplatz |
| ET Business Object | [PP\_WRKCTR](https://confluence.cbs-consulting.de/display/CCETSLT/Work+centers) |
| S/4 Business Object | PP\_WRKCTR\_SDT |
| S/4 to S/4 Business Object | PP\_WRKCTR\_S4 |
| Transactional |  |
**Tables**
==========

|  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Table | Description EN | Bezeichnung DE | Master table |
| KAPE | Capacity unit of measure allocation | Kapazität Basiseinheit Zuordnung |  |
| CRCA | Work Center Capacity Allocation | Arbeitsplatz Kapazitätszuordnung |  |
| CRCO | Assignment of Work Center to Cost Center | Arbeitsplatz Kostenstellenzuordnung |  |
| **CRHD** | **Work Center Header** | **Arbeitsplatz Kopf** | **x** |
| CRID | CIM Resource - Entities | Production resource - entities |  |
| CRTX | Text for the Work Center or Production Resource/Tool | Arbeitsplatz/ Fertigungshilfsmittel Kurzbezeichnung |  |
| KAKO | Capacity Header Segment | Kapazitaet Kopfsegment |  |
| KAKT | Capacity Description | Kapazitaet Bezeichnung |  |
| KAPA | Shift Parameters for Available Capacity | Kapazität Schichtwerte |  |
| KAZY | Interval of Available Capacity | Kapazität Angebotsintervalle |  |
| VERTE | Assignment of CAPP processes to work centers | Zuordnung von CAP-Verfahren zu Arbeitsplätzen |  |
| VERFT | Process texts | Verfahrenstexte |  |
| T705R | Assignment of work center to subsystem link group | Zuordnung Arbeitsplatz BDE-Gruppe |  |

**ET Business Object:** [PP\_WRKCTR](https://confluence.cbs-consulting.de/display/CCETSLT/Work+centers)
**Name (en):** Work Center
**General Description**
=======================

Operations are carried out at a work center. In the SAP system work centers are business objects that can represent the following real work centers, for example:

* Machines, machine groups
* Production lines
* Assembly work centers
* Employees, groups of employees

Together with bills of material and routings, work centers belong to the most important master data in the production planning and control system. Work centers are used in task list operations and work orders. Task lists are for example routings, maintenance task lists, inspection plans and standard networks. Work orders are created for production, quality assurance, plant maintenance and for the Project System as networks.

The BO PP\_WRKCTR contains the required tables to migrate the SAP Work centers. 

Data in work centers is used for

* Scheduling

  Operating times and formulas are entered in the work center, so that the duration of an operation can be calculated.
* Costing

  Formulas are entered in the work center, so that the costs of an operation can be calculated. A work center is also assigned to a cost center.
* Capacity planning

  The available capacity and formulas for calculating capacity requirements are entered in the work center.
* Simplifying operation maintenance

  The structure of the BO is comprised of a Header table, plus several child tables linked underneath by their respective Table Key Relationships (TKR).

================================================================================

**Name (en):** Material Master
**General Description**
=======================

The material master contains information on all the materials that a company procures or produces, stores and sells. It is the central source for retrieving material-specific data.

**Overview**

---
title: Retail revaluation document
page_id: 120095410
space: unknown
url: https://confluence.cbs-consulting.de/pages/120095410
---
**Overview**
============

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| Name (en) | MM - Retail Revaluation Document |
| Name (de) | MM - Retail Revaluation Document |
| ET Business Object | MM\_REVDOC  (till ET 2021 FP 2 MM60REVDOC) |
| S/4 Business Object |  |
| IDOC Business Object |  |
**Tables**
==========

|  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **tables** | **Description** | **Bezeichnung DE** | **Header table** |
| UKPF | Retail Revaluation Document: Revaluation Header | Verkaufswertänderungs-Beleg: Umbewertungskopf | X |
| USEG | Retail Revaluation Document: Revaluation Segment | Verkaufswertänderungs-Beleg: Umbewertungssegment |  |

**ET Business Object:** MM\_REVDOC  (till ET 2021 FP 2 MM60REVDOC)
**Name (en):** MM - Retail Revaluation Document
**General Description**
=======================

If you change the retail price of an article and the stock is managed at retail, stock has to be revaluated at retail so that Inventory Management is exact. If you do *not* revaluate the stock, the margin between cost and retail would no longer be accurate and this would lead to goods movements for stock managed on a value-only article basis being valuated incorrectly . A retail revaluation document is updated whenever inventory is revaluated at retail.

================================================================================

Tables from **MM\_STOCK\_S4** doesn't have \*H tables. They will be displayed, but they are CDS views. So no migration.

Most values will be derived from MATDOC/MATDOC\_EXTRACT see

Most values will be derived from ADOCA/ACDOCA\_M\_EXTRACT

==========

|  |  |  |  |

| **tables** | **Description** | **Bezeichnung DE** | **Header table** |
| LDK00 | Status Record for WM Communication Records | Statussatz der LVS-Kommunikationssätze |  |
| LDK01 | Communication Record 01 Decentralized WMS: GR/GI R/2 -> ERP | Kommunikationssatz 01 LVS-Dezentral: WE/WA  R/2 ->ERP |  |
| LDK02 | Communicat.Record 02 Decentralized WMS: Transfer R/2 -> ERP | Kommunikationssatz 02 LVS-Dezentral: Umbuchen R/2 -> ERP |  |
| LDK03 | Communication Rec. 03 Decentralized WMS: Del.Doc. R/2 -> ERP | Kommunikationssatz 03 LVS-Dezentral: Lieferbeleg R/2 -> ERP |  |
| LDK04 | Communication Rec. 04 LVS Decentr.: DN Supplem. R/2 -> ERP | Kommunikationssatz 04 LVS-Dezentral: LF Anhang  R/2 -> ERP |  |
| LDK05 | Communication Record 05 Decentr. WMS: (R/2-ERP): Mat. Master | Kommunikationssatz 05 LVS-Dezentral (R/2-ERP): Materialstamm |  |

**ET Business Object:** WM\_LDK  (till ET 2021 FP 2 WM60LDK)
**Name (en):** Communication record
**General Description**
=======================

A communication record is a data extract in R/3 format that consists of the individual data to be transmitted. Because different data has to be transmitted, depending on the transaction involved and the direction of the communication process, communication records are assigned to a record type. Each of the tables in this BO contains a different record type.

================================================================================

---
title: FSCM TRM TAX Transaction
page_id: 307374304
space: unknown
url: https://confluence.cbs-consulting.de/pages/307374304
---
**Overview**
============

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| Name (en) | FSCM TRM TAX Transaction |
| Name (de) | FSCM TRM Steuervorgangsbewegungen |
| ET Business Object | FSCM\_*TRM\_TRXT* |
| S/4 SDT Business Object | FSCM\_*TRM\_TRXT* |
| S/4 to S/4 Business Object | FSCM\_*TRM\_TRXT* |
| IDOC Business Object | N/A |
**Tables**
==========

All Tables

| tables | Description EN | Bezeichnung DE | Header table |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| TRXT\_FLOW | TRM Tax Transaction Flows | TRM-Steuervorgangsbewegungen | X |
| TRXT\_TRANSACTION | TRM Tax Transactions | TRM-Steuervorgänge |  |
| TRXT\_WT\_ASSIGN | TRM Withholding Tax Information Assignment | TRM-Quellensteuerinformationszuordnung |  |

**ET Business Object:** FSCM\_*TRM\_TRXT
**Name (en):** FSCM TRM TAX Transaction
**General Description**
=======================

As already known, SAP Treasury deals with the management of a company's financial risks and liquidity. In the context of taxes, SAP Treasury refers to the integration of tax processes and functions into the treasury management system. This enables the efficient processing of tax payments, the monitoring of tax receivables and liabilities and the optimization of the tax burden.

Within SAP TRM there are specific functions for tax and risk management. These include...

* Tax analysis and reporting:  
  SAP TRM enables the analysis of tax positions, the creation of tax reports and the monitoring of tax payments.
* Integration with other SAP modules:  
  SAP TRM is closely integrated with other SAP modules such as FI (Financial Accounting) and CO (Controlling), which enables a holistic view of the company's financial situation.
* Automation of tax processes:  
  SAP TRM offers functions for the automation of processes such as the preparation of tax returns and the processing of tax payments.
* Risk management in the tax area:  
  SAP TRM also supports the management of tax change risks and the optimization of the tax position through targeted measures.

The business object FSCM\_TRM\_TRXT is used to migrate the associated tax tables.

================================================================================

**Tables**
==========

|  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **Table** | **Description (EN)** | **Bezeichnung (DE)** | **Main Table** |
| QCPR | QM quality certificates in procurement | QM Qualitätszeugnisse in der Beschaffung | X |

**ET Business Object:** QM\_QCER
**Name (en):** Quality Certificates
**General Description**
=======================

This BO contains the required tables to migrate the quality certificates in procurement.

A quality certificate (customer-specific or general) certifies the quality of goods. The chemical or physical properties of goods can be recorded as inspection results or characteristics for the batch. Generally, a quality certificate is created automatically or semi-automatically for a delivery item. A certificate can be directly created for an inspection lot or a batch, when a delivery does not exist.

This BO will only migrate the certificates assigned to objects, not the certificate profiles.

================================================================================

FI documents consist of a header table BKPF and the positions in BSEG. Additionally, the data is stored in the so called index tables BS\*. BO: **FI\_BKPF**

When New Gl is activated, a general ledger view is added to the FI document. The tables FAGLFLEX\* need to be migrated as well. Use BO **FI\_FAGL** instead.

For details in New GL see

=======================

| SAP RE-FX | Flexible Real Estate Mgmt | ❌ No |

---
title: Migration Steplist
page_id: 295223695
space: unknown
url: https://confluence.cbs-consulting.de/pages/295223695
---
Overview
========

If it is a separate business partner migration, possible dependent objects must also be migrated from the ECC system (such as texts, changedocs and classifications that belong to the migration-relevant customers and suppliers). However, these dependent objects are not relevant for the generation of the businesspartners. 

Normally, the MD2BP\*-BO's run as part of a larger conversion, so that the dependent objects run anyway.

---

================================================================================

page_id: 354551705
space: unknown
url: https://confluence.cbs-consulting.de/pages/354551705
---
**Overview**
============

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| Name (en) | Inventory Data per Quant (No Inventory document) |
| Name (de) | Inventurdaten pro Quant |
| ET Business Object | WM\_PHYID\_QUANT |
| S/4 Business Object | n/a |
| IDOC Business Object | n/a |
**Tables**
==========

|  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **tables** | **Description** | **Bezeichnung DE** | **Header table** |
| LINV | Inventory data per quant | Inventurdaten pro Quant | X |

**ET Business Object:** WM\_PHYID\_QUANT
**Name (en):** Inventory Data per Quant (No Inventory document)
**General Description**
=======================

There could be records related to Annual or Continuous inventory not linked to an Inventory Document (LINK) table. Those records, will not be captured by WM\_PHYID but on the specific WM\_PHYID\_QUANT.

LGNUM filter will ensure only relevant records for Org Units in scope are selected.

IDATU filter will ensure only relevant project time-slice is consider in select (when empty, filter will not apply).

NOT EXISTS sub-query will ensure only the records with no header (LINK) are selected; preventing collecting same records (duplicate) from WM\_PHYID.

================================================================================

**ET Business Object:** FSCM\_IHC\_PLANITEMS
**Name (en):** FSCM IHC Planned Payment Items
**General Description**
=======================

Planned payment items are payment items with a posting date in the future. They are used to track payment items that must be posted after the current posting date. Their structure is the same as regular payment items.

================================================================================

---
title: Ledger group specific clearing
page_id: 113102246
space: unknown
url: https://confluence.cbs-consulting.de/pages/113102246
---
Overview
========

In New G/L projects we often face the requirement to activate the ledger group specific clearing in G/L account master data (table SKB1). We provide approaches for the activations which at some points are coming with certain restrictions. This will be explained in this section.

This requirement is coming up when implementing the ledger solution. For general information and approaches to implement the ledger solution, please see this section (link). This chapter is purely concentrating on the ledger group specific clearing.

================================================================================

| ADR8 | X.400 Numbers (Business Address Services) | X.400-Nummern (Business Address Services) |  |
| ADR9 | RFC Destinations (Business Address Services) | RFC-Destinationen (Business Address Services) |  |
| ADR10 | Printer (Business Address Services) | Drucker (Business Address Services) |  |
| ADR11 | SSF (Business Address Services) | SSF (Business Address Services) |  |
| ADR12 | FTP and URL (Business Address Services) | FTP und URL (Business Address Services) |  |

| ADRG | Assignment of Addresses to Other Address Groups (BAS) | Zuordnung von Adressen zu weiteren Adreßgruppen (B.Adr.Srvs) |  |
| ADRT | Communication Data Text (Business Address Services) | Texte zu Kommunikationsdaten (Business Address Services) |  |
| ADRU | Table for Communication Usages | Tabelle für Kommunikationsverwendungen |  |
| ADRV | Address Where-Used List (Business Address Services) | Verwendungsnachweis für Adressen (Business Address Services) |  |
| ADCP | Person/Address Assignment (Business Address Services) | Zuordnung Person/Adresse (Business Address Services) |  |
| ADRP | Persons (Business Address Services) | Personen (Business Address Services) | X |
| ADRVP | Person Where-Used List (Business Address Services) | Verwendungsnachweis für Personen (Business Address Services) |  |

| /CBSGMBH/V\_ADR | ADRC-ADCP View for Addresses BOH (Object classes: ADDRESSE2  and ADDRESSE3) | ADRC-ADCP Sicht für Addressen BOH (Object Klassen: ADDRESSE2 und ADDRESSE3) |  |

ADRCITY

Careful: ADRCITY is a customizing table. Check with customer if you want to migrate. (removed from standard BO as of ET 2021)

**ET Business Object:** CA\_ADDRESS and  CA\_ADDRESS\_PERS
**Name (en):** Address Tables
**General Description**
=======================

Address numbers in SAP can be found in several (mostly) master data related objects (e.g., customers, vendors, bank data etc.) and in separate address data tables (ADRC, ADR2, ADCP etc.). The address data tables (ADR\*, ADCP) hold the detailed address information such as telephone numbers, e-mails etc. and are summarized in the BO CA\_ADDRESS. It is most of all relevant for migrations (carve-out, merge etc.): The address data needs to be exported and migrated as well so the application transactions function smoothly after GoLive.

================================================================================

page_id: 118230232

---
**Overview**
============

| --- | --- |
| Name (EN) | Entry List Measurement Documents |
| Name (DE) | Erfassungsliste Messbelege |
| ET Business Object | PM\_IMEL  (till ET 2021 FP 2 PM60IMEL) |
| S/4 Business Object | N/A |
**Tables**
==========

|  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **Table** | **Description (EN)** | **Bezeichnung (DE)** | **Main Table** |
| IMEL | Entry List for Measurement Documents | Erfassungsliste für Meßbelege | X |
| IMEP | Items in the Entry List | Positionen in der Erfassungsliste | X |

**ET Business Object:** PM\_IMEL  (till ET 2021 FP 2 PM60IMEL)
**Name (en):** Entry List Measurement Documents
**General Description**
=======================

This BO contains the required tables to migrate the entry list of measuring points. The entry list is used to compile a list of measuring points and counters in a freely definable sequence, so that measurement readings can be entered for it (for example, in preparation for the meter reader). Therefore this BO does not include the tables with the measuring points and documents.

================================================================================

**Name (en):** CO - Standard Rate / Tariff
General Description
===================

 Complex for reassigning the individual fields, since the dependencies cannot be uniquely assigned!

It is a basic or minimum rateestablished for similar work or occupation within a plant, industry, or community by collective agreement or union rule or by law.

title: Invoicing plan

**Overview**
============

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| Name (en) |  |
| Name (de) |  |
| ET Business Object | [SD\_BILLPL](https://confluence.cbs-consulting.de/display/CCETSLT/SD+Billing+Plan)  (till ET 2021 FP 2 [SD60BILLPL](https://confluence.cbs-consulting.de/display/CCETSLT/Business+Objects)) |
| S/4 Business Object |  |
| IDOC Business Object |  |
**Tables**
==========

|  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **tables** | **Description** | **Bezeichnung DE** | **Header table** |
|  |  |  |  |

**ET Business Object:** [SD\_BILLPL](https://confluence.cbs-consulting.de/display/CCETSLT/SD+Billing+Plan)  (till ET 2021 FP 2 [SD60BILLPL](https://confluence.cbs-consulting.de/display/CCETSLT/Business+Objects))
**General Description**
=======================

The invoicing plan is a utility allowing you to specify when and for which amount you wish to create invoices.

The creation of the invoice is independent of the receipt of the goods or the service (service entry).

We have no own MM BO for invoicing plans. All relevant tables can be found in BO [SD\_BILLPL](https://confluence.cbs-consulting.de/display/CCETSLT/SD+Billing+Plan).

================================================================================

title: FSCM CLM Cash Management single items FI
page_id: 307378099
space: unknown
url: https://confluence.cbs-consulting.de/pages/307378099
---
**Overview**
============

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| Name (en) | Cash Management single Items FI |
| Name (de) | Cash Management Einzelposten FI |
| ET Business Object | FSCM\_CLM\_LQ\_FI |
| S/4 SDT Business Object | N/A |
| S/4 to S/4 Business Object | N/A |
| IDOC Business Object | N/A |
**Tables**
==========

All Tables

| tables | Description EN | Bezeichnung DE | Header table |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| FDES | Cash Management and Forecast: Memo Records | Finanzdispo-Einzelsätze |  |
| FDFIEP | CM: FI Line Items (OP of Deb/Cred for Drilldown) | CM: FI-Einzelposten (OP von Deb./Kred. für Drilldown) |  |
| FDM1 | Cash Management & Forecast: Line Items of MM Documents | Finanzdispo-Einzelposten der MM-Bestellungen |  |
| FDM2 | Cash management line items from MM purchase requisition | Finanzdispo-Einzelposten der MM-Bestellanforderungen |  |
| FDSB | CMF Totals Records for G/L Accounts | Finanzdispo-Summensätze der Sachkonten |  |

**ET Business Object:** FSCM\_CLM\_LQ\_FI
**Name (en):** Cash Management single Items FI
**General Description**
=======================

Table FDES was replaced by a CDS view in S/4, but still also remains as a transparent table. This means that the contents of the original FDES table are not visible in SE16 after a migration.

Instead, a new table FQM\_FLOW, which the CDS view looks at, needs to be filled. The customer should be encouraged to use SAP standard to accomplish this.  
(Report FCLM\_MIGR\_FDES2FQM will fill table FQM\_FLOW. However, other steps may be necessary, depending on the configuration of cash management.)

================================================================================

| RBDRSEG | Batch IV: Invoice Document Items | Reprü-Batch - Rechnungsbelegpositionen |  |  |

**ET Business Object:** MM\_INVOIC
**Name (en):** MM invoice
**General Description**
=======================

In Logistics Invoice Verification the incoming invoices are verified in terms of their content, prices and arithmetic. When the invoice is posted in SAP, the invoice data is saved in the MM invoice document. 

Not only invoices but also Credit Memos and Subsequent Debits/Credits can be saved in the invoice documents.

================================================================================

title: FSCM TRM Volatility
page_id: 307374282
space: unknown
url: https://confluence.cbs-consulting.de/pages/307374282
---
**Overview**
============

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| Name (en) | FSCM TRM Volatility |
| Name (de) | FSCM TRM Volatilität |
| ET Business Object | FSCM\_*TRM\_*ATV |
| S/4 SDT Business Object | FSCM\_*TRM\_ATV* |
| S/4 to S/4 Business Object | FSCM\_*TRM\_ATV* |
| IDOC Business Object | N/A |
**Tables**
==========

All Tables

| tables | Description EN | Bezeichnung DE | Header table |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| ATVO0 | Volatilitäten - Definition Volatilitätsname | Volatilitäten - Definition Volatilitätsname | X |
| ATVO0T | Text Table for Name of Volatility | Texttabelle für Name der Volatilität |  |
| ATVO61 | Volatilities - Mapping from Reference Interest Rates | Volatilitäten - Mapping von Zinsreferenzen |  |
| ATVO62 | Volatilities - Mapping from Currency Pairs | Volatilitäten - Zuordnung von Währungspaaren |  |
| ATVO63 | Volatilities - Mapping from Security ID Numbers | Volatilitäten - Zuordnung von Wertpapierkenummern |  |
| ATVO64 | Volatilities - Mapping from Security Indexes | Volatilitäten - Zuordnung von Wertpapierindizes |  |

**ET Business Object:** FSCM\_*TRM\_*ATV
**Name (en):** FSCM TRM Volatility
**General Description**
=======================

As a measure of risk, volatilities describe the range of fluctuation of a price parameter during a certain period and thus the positive as well as negative deviation of market parameters from their expected value.

The following volatilities are differentiated according to how they are determined:

**Historical volatilities**

Historical volatilities are determined on the basis of historical data of the price parameter. The volatility is estimated from the sample standard deviation.

**Implied volatilities**

Implied volatilities are derived from the option prices quoted on the market for a price parameter. Implied volatility makes the market's expectations about the future transparent.

Use  
Historical volatilities can be used both in the value-at-risk approach and for the option price calculators. To use historical volatilities, you must link them to a statistics type in Customizing.

Implied volatilities should only be used in the SAP system in the option price calculators.

Historical volatilities and implicit volatilities are usually transferred to the system externally. It is also possible to calculate historical volatilities directly in the SAP system using the statistics calculator.

The business object FSCM\_TRM\_ATV is used to transfer the data on volatilities with moneyness. Volatilities with moneyness (also known as implied volatilities) result from the option prices quoted on the market for a price parameter. They reflect the market's expectations about the future. The volatility with moneyness is usually not the same across all option terms. Rather, as with the yield curve, there is a volatility structure. It should also be noted that the implied volatility depends on the strike price for identical maturities. This behavior is called the smile effect.

Volatilities with moneyness are stored in the central volatility database.

================================================================================

**ET Business Object:** CO\_CTRL  (till ET 2021 FP 2 CO60CTRL)
**Name (en):** CO control tables
General Description
===================

Control tables are used to store the data from the screens or programs. Thereby the control data, regarding the organization data, are stored.

Control tables are tables used to store data related to the data dictionary itself rather than transactional, user, master data, etc. These tables store properties of other tables and programs.

**Name (en):** Documents for Settlement
General Description
===================

The settlement document is a means to uniquey identify a settlement in the system. For this purpose, a settlement document must be created for each settlement o a sender object and saved under a separate number.

The settlement document is a necessary prerequisite for the cancellation of settlements.

The settlement documents are defined in number ranges in the settings of the sender object.

space: unknown
url: https://confluence.cbs-consulting.de/pages/344857446
---
**Overview**
============

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| Name (en) | Inheritance |
| Name (de) | Erbschaft |
| ET Business Object | EHS\_INHERIT |
| S/4 SDT Business Object | EHS\_INHERIT |
| S/4 to S/4 Business Object | EHS\_INHERIT |

**Tables**
==========

All Tables

| Tables | Description EN | Bezeichnung DE | Header table |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| EHSBT\_REL02 | Control Table for Local Overwrite of Inheritance | EHS: Steuerungstabelle für lok. Übersch. der  Vererbung |  |
| TCGHIT | No. of hits | Trefferanzahl |  |
| TCGHITPOS | Set of hit items | EHS: Positionen zu Treffermengen |  |
| TCGTPLH | Inheritance Template Header | Vererbungsvorlagenkopf | X |
| TCGTPLHD | Inheritance Templates - Descriptions | EHS: Vererbungsvorlagen - Beschreibungen |  |
| TCGTPLREL | Inheritance Relationships | Vererbungsbeziehungen |  |

**ET Business Object:** EHS\_INHERIT
**Name (en):** Inheritance
**General Description**
=======================

In **SAP EHS ( Environmental Health and Safety)**, **inheritance**  refers to the substance information that can be passed on or passed from another template substance.

For example:

Inheritance in SAP EHS is a crucial feature for managing data across specifications. It allows for the transfer of data from a source specification to a target specification, enabling multilevel inheritance. This process is controlled by an inheritance template, which specifies which identifiers and value assignments are passed on and their usage. The inheritance relationship ensures that the data is updated automatically if changes are made in the source specification. Inheritance is an extension of the existing reference, allowing for flexible data management and maintenance across different specifications.

================================================================================
